scenario: Synthetic pre-deployment review for an assistant that drafts partner-research notes from approved CRM exports and public web pages, with no direct CRM writeback or public outreach authority.

connected_systems.access_type: Read approved redacted CSV exports only
connected_systems.revocation_method: Remove folder ACL entry and rotate the export folder path
connected_systems.notes: ACL removal was tested; path rotation has not been included in the drill yet.

connected_systems.access_type: Write draft Markdown notes to a local review folder
connected_systems.revocation_method: Disable workspace service account and archive pending draft folder read-only
connected_systems.notes: No customer-facing publishing or email connector is attached.

connected_systems.access_type: Runs a local enrichment job every Monday morning during the pilot
connected_systems.revocation_method: Disable scheduled job and preserve last run log
connected_systems.notes: The pause button in the project board does not stop the scheduler by itself.

permissions_to_revoke: Read access to the approved CRM export folder
Write access to the draft research notes workspace
Any cached local copy of the previous export after the review window
pause_trigger: Any unexpected sensitive field in the export, unreviewed writeback request, unexplained run log, or partner complaint about generated notes.

revocation_steps.step: Freeze new runs and disable the scheduled job before reviewing drafts
revocation_steps.evidence: Scheduler screenshot or local job config export showing disabled state; no secrets copied into this card

revocation_steps.step: Remove read access to the CRM export folder and move the current export to an archive path
revocation_steps.evidence: Folder ACL export and archive manifest stored in the internal governance folder

revocation_steps.step: Preserve generated draft notes, run logs, and review comments before deleting working cache
revocation_steps.evidence: Archive checklist with filenames and timestamps, excluding credentials or private tokens

revocation_steps.step: Notify the human review queue that AI-generated partner notes are paused and must not be imported
revocation_steps.evidence: Local queue note and meeting decision record

dependent_workflows: Partnerships team will lose weekly draft categorization notes while paused
Quarterly partner cleanup metric may slip by one week
Human reviewers need a fallback spreadsheet template for urgent partner updates
evidence_to_preserve: Export schema used for the run
Human review comments that explain why the pause was triggered
restart_criteria: Scheduler disable/enable path tested by IT support lead
Export schema excludes sensitive relationship notes by default
Partnerships manager signs off on fallback review queue
One dry-run produces no direct CRM writeback and no public outreach
open_gaps: Project-board pause status does not disable the scheduler
No written maximum age for cached export files
Fallback spreadsheet template exists but is not linked in the pause procedure
required_next_action: Run a local revocation drill that disables the scheduler and preserves evidence before expanding the pilot beyond synthetic data.
boundary_note: Local review aid only. Not an IAM system, security control, incident-response plan, compliance audit, legal opinion, vendor certification, or guarantee that revocation works. Do not store secrets, tokens, credentials, or sensitive logs here.
notes: Synthetic example; no real CRM, account, or scheduler was touched.
